'''zhazuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackee|smackee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackee|smackee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhazuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzijith|zhæzijith]] || [[word:zhæzijij|zhæzijij]] || [[word:zhæzijish|zhæzijish]] || [[word:zhæziji|zhæziji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazuzujuth|zhazuzujuth]] || [[word:zhazuzujuj|zhazuzujuj]] || [[word:zhazuzujush|zhazuzujush]] || [[word:zhazuzuju|zhazuzuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazujuth|zhazujuth]] || [[word:zhazujuj|zhazujuj]] || [[word:zhazujush|zhazujush]] || [[word:zhazuju|zhazuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazufjuth|zhazufjuth]] || [[word:zhazufjuj|zhazufjuj]] || [[word:zhazufjush|zhazufjush]] || [[word:zhazufjuf|zhazufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazujuthu|zhazujuthu]] || [[word:zhazujuju|zhazujuju]] || [[word:zhazujushu|zhazujushu]] || [[word:zhazujuku|zhazujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazujuth|zhazujuth]] || [[word:zhazujuj|zhazujuj]] || [[word:zhazujush|zhazujush]] || [[word:zhazuju|zhazuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazujuthul|zhazujuthul]] || [[word:zhazujujul|zhazujujul]] || [[word:zhazujushul|zhazujushul]] || [[word:zhazujukul|zhazujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazujuthuthu|zhazujuthuthu]] || [[word:zhazujujuju|zhazujujuju]] || [[word:zhazujushushu|zhazujushushu]] || [[word:zhazujuku|zhazujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazujuthun|zhazujuthun]] || [[word:zhazujujun|zhazujujun]] || [[word:zhazujushun|zhazujushun]] || [[word:zhazujukun|zhazujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazujuthuoro|zhazujuthuoro]] || [[word:zhazujujuoro|zhazujujuoro]] || [[word:zhazujushuoro|zhazujushuoro]] || [[word:zhazujukuoro|zhazujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
